title: Spanish Soft Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy pilaf dish inspired by Spanish cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 tsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the pilaf seasoning and stir to combine.
Add the cubed bread and stir to coat with the onion mixture.
Add the Spanish rice and stir to combine with the bread mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
